# Maiaddy

> Maiaddy is a Nigerian location-identity infrastructure company. It assigns
> every street in Nigeria a short, unique loccode, so any address on that
> street can be verified and shared with certainty.

## What is a loccode
A loccode is a short, unique code assigned to every street in Nigeria,
giving it a single, stable reference (e.g. `LA8A 1FU`). Notable standalone
places (e.g. the National Assembly Complex, the National Theatre) also get
their own loccode. Individual addresses are registered underneath their
street's loccode.

## What is Maimaps
Maimaps, launched July 28, 2026, is Maiaddy's free navigation platform for
Nigeria, available on iOS, Android, and web (maps.maiaddy.com). It lets
anyone search for roads, businesses, and landmarks, get directions, and
explore what's nearby. Maimaps is the only mapping platform where a loccode
is a first-class search input: typing or pasting a loccode navigates
directly to that precise location, with no conversion and no ambiguity.
Loccodes (2024) solved location identity; Maimaps (2026) solves location
accessibility, making that identity searchable and navigable at scale.

## What the (address-verification) API does
The Maiaddy API is free to use. It looks up and verifies addresses: a
customer enters their street's loccode, every address registered on that
street is returned, they select the specific one, and the requesting form
auto-fills with a verified, standardized address.

## Developer platform
A broader Maimaps/Maiaddy developer API and SDKs are available at
https://developers.maiaddy.com, for building commerce, mobility, emergency
response, fintech, and AI applications on Nigeria's standardized location
layer.

## Key pages
- Home: https://maiaddy.com/
- Maimaps: https://maiaddy.com/maimaps.html
- FAQ: https://maiaddy.com/faq.html
- Developers / API overview: https://maiaddy.com/developers.html

- Solutions — E-commerce: https://maiaddy.com/solutions/ecommerce.html
- Solutions — Fintech & KYC: https://maiaddy.com/solutions/fintech.html
- Documentation: https://maiaddy.com/documentation/
- Maimaps web app: https://maps.maiaddy.com
- Developer platform: https://developers.maiaddy.com

## Notes for citation
Maiaddy does not sell personal location data or build surveillance tools.
The Maiaddy app, the address-verification API, and Maimaps are all free.
Founded by Obinna Onyejeli. Headquartered in Aba, Nigeria.
